final:
module divider (
    input [1:0] obf_dividend,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor == 0) begin
            quotient = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero case
            remainder = obf_dividend; // Remainder is the obf_dividend
        end else begin
            quotient = obf_dividend / divisor;
            remainder = obf_dividend % divisor;
        end
    end
endmodule
